sql.statement: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM raw_business_data.objects WHERE is_deleted IS NOT TRUE

WITH last_activity AS (SELECT device_id, MAX(device_time) AS last_device_time FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core WHERE event_id IN (2, 802, 803, 804, 811) AND latitude <> 0 AND longitude <> 0 GROUP BY device_id) SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM raw_business_data.objects o LEFT JOIN last_activity la ON o.device_id = la.device_id WHERE o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE AND (la.last_device_time IS NULL OR la.last_device_time < NOW() - INTERVAL '3 days')

WITH track_gaps AS (SELECT device_id, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (LEAD(track_start_time) OVER (PARTITION BY device_id ORDER BY track_start_time) - track_end_time)) / 3600 AS gap_hours FROM business_data.tracks WHERE track_start_time >= DATE_TRUNC('month', NOW())) SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT device_id) AS value FROM track_gaps WHERE gap_hours >= 24

SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM (SELECT zv.device_id FROM business_data.zone_visits zv JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.device_id = zv.device_id WHERE o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE AND zv.exit_time IS NOT NULL AND zv.enter_time >= DATE_TRUNC('month', NOW()) GROUP BY zv.device_id HAVING COUNT(*) >= 3) t

SELECT COALESCE(o.object_label, 'device_' || t.device_id) AS category, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(t.track_distance_meters), 0) / 1000.0, 2) AS value FROM raw_business_data.objects o LEFT JOIN business_data.tracks t ON o.device_id = t.device_id AND t.track_start_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' WHERE o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE GROUP BY o.object_label, t.device_id ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 15

WITH last_activity AS (SELECT device_id, MAX(device_time) AS last_device_time FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core WHERE event_id IN (2, 802, 803, 804, 811) AND latitude <> 0 AND longitude <> 0 GROUP BY device_id), classified AS (SELECT CASE WHEN la.last_device_time IS NULL OR la.last_device_time < NOW() - INTERVAL '3 days' THEN 'Offline (3d+)' WHEN la.last_device_time < NOW() - INTERVAL '1 day' THEN 'Warning (1-3d)' ELSE 'Active (24h)' END AS status FROM raw_business_data.objects o LEFT JOIN last_activity la ON o.device_id = la.device_id WHERE o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE) SELECT status AS category, COUNT(*) AS value FROM classified GROUP BY status ORDER BY status

panels.title: Top 10 Vehicles by Zone Exits This Month

sql.statement: SELECT COALESCE(o.object_label, 'device_' || o.device_id) AS category, COUNT(*) AS value FROM business_data.zone_visits zv JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.device_id = zv.device_id WHERE o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE AND zv.exit_time IS NOT NULL AND zv.enter_time >= DATE_TRUNC('month', NOW()) GROUP BY o.object_label, o.device_id ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 10

WITH last_activity AS (SELECT device_id, MAX(device_time) AS last_device_time FROM raw_telematics_data.tracking_data_core WHERE event_id IN (2, 802, 803, 804, 811) AND latitude <> 0 AND longitude <> 0 GROUP BY device_id) SELECT COALESCE(o.object_label, 'device_' || o.device_id) AS vehicle, ROUND(COALESCE(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - la.last_device_time)) / 86400, 9999)::numeric, 1) AS days_offline FROM raw_business_data.objects o LEFT JOIN last_activity la ON o.device_id = la.device_id WHERE o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE AND (la.last_device_time IS NULL OR la.last_device_time < NOW() - INTERVAL '3 days') ORDER BY days_offline DESC

WITH track_gaps AS (SELECT o.object_label, o.device_id, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (LEAD(t.track_start_time) OVER (PARTITION BY t.device_id ORDER BY t.track_start_time) - t.track_end_time)) / 3600 AS gap_hours FROM business_data.tracks t JOIN raw_business_data.objects o ON o.device_id = t.device_id AND o.is_deleted IS NOT TRUE WHERE t.track_start_time >= DATE_TRUNC('month', NOW())) SELECT COALESCE(object_label, 'device_' || device_id) AS vehicle, ROUND(MAX(gap_hours)::numeric, 1) AS max_stop_hours, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE gap_hours >= 24) AS long_stop_count FROM track_gaps WHERE gap_hours >= 24 GROUP BY object_label, device_id ORDER BY max_stop_hours DESC
